en_title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced's Controversial Day 1 DLC Earned $1 Million, Just on Steam
cn_title: 争议DLC为《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》Steam创收百万美元
subtitle: 首日DLC引发反弹
opus_summary: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》价值85美元(约合人民币576元)的首日DLC在Steam额外创收100万美元(约合人民币678万元)，但定价、付费优势和游戏内弹窗也拖累了玩家评价。

paragraphs.en: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced's controversial $85 collection of day one DLC earned Ubisoft an extra $1 million on Steam, it's been reported.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》备受争议、总价85美元(约合人民币576元)的首日DLC合集，在Steam上为育碧额外带来了100万美元(约合人民币678万元)收入。

paragraphs.en: That's according to Alinea Analytics' , who has published detailed sales information for the game's PC release. Ubisoft itself has officially trumpeted 2 million sales of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced across all platforms in just 24 hours.
paragraphs.cn: 这一数据来自Alinea Analytics发布的本作PC版详细销售信息。育碧官方则高调宣布，《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》全平台销量在短短24小时内达到200万份。

paragraphs.en: While the game itself has been warmly received, fans have been less impressed by its optional extra packs, which total a collective $85 — more than the game itself.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏本身获得了热烈反响，但粉丝对可选附加包就没那么满意了：这些内容合计售价85美元(约合人民币576元)，甚至高于游戏本体。

paragraphs.en: "Come on Ubisoft you just couldn't hold yourself huh?!" wrote one player via Steam. "Releasing a 70 euro game and on the DAY of the release you slap us with 85 euros worth of DLC packs that are just not cosmetic but give you a gameplay advantage this is why piracy exist and I will be refunding!"
paragraphs.cn: 一名玩家在Steam写道：「得了吧育碧，你们就是忍不住，对吧？！一款70欧元(约合人民币541元)的游戏，发售当天就塞给我们价值85欧元(约合人民币657元)的DLC包，而且还不只是外观内容，甚至能提供玩法优势。盗版之所以存在就是因为这个，我要退款！」

paragraphs.en: Backlash at the offering has dragged down the game's Steam user review average, with many players upset at the principle of Ubisoft launching Resynced with a more expensive DLC collection than the cost of the base game, as well as the fact that Resynced also highlights these extra packs to players in-game via a pop-up message.
paragraphs.cn: 围绕这些内容的反弹拉低了游戏在Steam上的用户评价均分。许多玩家不满育碧在游戏首发时推出比本体还贵的DLC合集，也不满游戏通过弹窗向玩家推销这些附加包。

paragraphs.en: The cheapest of these extra packs, the $4.99 Map Pack, reportedly has a 6.34% Steam attach rate — meaning that around 1 in 15 of players purchased it. (The pack, a mainstay of Assassin's Creed releases, highlights in-game collectibles without the need to discover their locations manually.)
paragraphs.cn: 据称，最便宜的4.99美元(约合人民币34元)地图包在Steam上的购买率为6.34%，也就是大约每15名玩家中有1人购买。（这种《刺客信条》系列常见的附加包会标出游戏内收集品，无需玩家自行探索位置。）

paragraphs.en: Fewer people purchased the game's various $9.99 cosmetic packs, with an attach rate for each around 2% — around 1 in 50 players. These provide premium skin packs for either Edward Kenway himself or his Jackdaw ship, though offer no real gameplay advantage. Still, for an extra $1m in revenue, you can see why Ubisoft keeps making them.
paragraphs.cn: 购买各款9.99美元(约合人民币68元)外观包的人更少，每款购买率约为2%，相当于每50名玩家中约有1人购买。这些内容为爱德华·肯威本人或寒鸦号提供高级皮肤，并不带来实际玩法优势。不过，既然能额外创收100万美元(约合人民币678万元)，也就不难理解育碧为何一直制作它们。

paragraphs.en: "We've seen your feedback since launch, and we're reading all of it," a Ubisoft community spokesperson said in a to the DLC backlash last week. "Thank you for caring this much about Black Flag Resynced. We want to be clear on one point: the standard edition is the full, complete experience. Every mission, every island, the full story and the complete world are all there, with nothing held back. The additional packs are entirely optional extras for players who want them, never a requirement to enjoy or complete the game. We'll keep listening as you play!"
paragraphs.cn: 育碧社区发言人上周在回应DLC争议时表示：「我们看到了发售以来的反馈，也在阅读每一条意见。感谢大家如此关心《黑旗 记忆重置》。我们想明确一点：标准版就是完整体验。每个任务、每座岛屿、完整故事和完整世界都包含在内，没有任何保留。附加包完全是提供给有需要玩家的可选额外内容，绝非享受或通关游戏的必要条件。随着大家继续游玩，我们也会继续倾听！」

paragraphs.en: "More than just a shinier version of the same game you remember, Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced brings what was already one of the best games in the series up to today’s standards," IGN wrote in our Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced review , rating the game 9/10.
paragraphs.cn: IGN在《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》评测中给出9/10分，并写道：「它不只是记忆中那款游戏更光鲜的版本，而是把这部本就位列系列最佳的作品提升到了当今标准。」

paragraphs.en: Before you dive into the Golden Age of Piracy, check out our guides on things to do first and tips and tricks to help Edward Kenway's journey be a smooth one. As you explore the Caribbean, make sure you don't miss a single collectible , especially the shanties to keep you and your crew entertained on the high seas. Blow other ships to smithereens with our and save Reales for your next Jackdaw upgrade to be the mightiest pirate you can be.
paragraphs.cn: 在投身海盗黄金时代前，不妨查看我们的开局必做事项和技巧指南，让爱德华·肯威的旅程更加顺利。探索加勒比海时别漏掉任何收集品，尤其是能让你和船员在海上消遣的船歌。借助我们的[原文此处缺失内容]把其他船只轰成碎片，并攒下里亚尔，用于下一次升级寒鸦号，成为最强大的海盗。

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》
